'''chosafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:bystanderish|bystanderish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-s-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bystanderish|bystanderish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chosafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chosafithi|chosafithi]] || [[word:chosafiji|chosafiji]] || [[word:chosafishi|chosafishi]] || [[word:chosafiki|chosafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chosafuthuthu|chosafuthuthu]] || [[word:chosafujuju|chosafujuju]] || [[word:chosafushushu|chosafushushu]] || [[word:chosafukuku|chosafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chosafuthu|chosafuthu]] || [[word:chosafuju|chosafuju]] || [[word:chosafushu|chosafushu]] || [[word:chosafuku|chosafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chosafufthuf|chosafufthuf]] || [[word:chosafufjuf|chosafufjuf]] || [[word:chosafufshuf|chosafufshuf]] || [[word:chosafufkuf|chosafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chosafethe|chosafethe]] || [[word:chosafeje|chosafeje]] || [[word:chosafeshe|chosafeshe]] || [[word:chosafeke|chosafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chosafothotho|chosafothotho]] || [[word:chosafojojo|chosafojojo]] || [[word:chosafoshosho|chosafoshosho]] || [[word:chosafokoko|chosafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chosafotho|chosafotho]] || [[word:chosafojo|chosafojo]] || [[word:chosafosho|chosafosho]] || [[word:chosafoko|chosafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chosafofthof|chosafofthof]] || [[word:chosafofjof|chosafofjof]] || [[word:chosafofshof|chosafofshof]] || [[word:chosafofkof|chosafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chosafïfthïf|chosafïfthïf]] || [[word:chosafïfjïf|chosafïfjïf]] || [[word:chosafïfshïf|chosafïfshïf]] || [[word:chosafïfkïf|chosafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chosafïfthïfthïf|chosafïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:chosafïfjïfjïf|chosafïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:chosafïfshïfshïf|chosafïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:chosafïfkïfkïf|chosafïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chosafïfthïf|chosafïfthïf]] || [[word:chosafïfjïf|chosafïfjïf]] || [[word:chosafïfshïf|chosafïfshïf]] || [[word:chosafïfkïf|chosafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chosafïfthïf|chosafïfthïf]] || [[word:chosafïfjïf|chosafïfjïf]] || [[word:chosafïfshïf|chosafïfshïf]] || [[word:chosafïfkïf|chosafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chosafæthæ|chosafæthæ]] || [[word:chosafæjæ|chosafæjæ]] || [[word:chosafæshæ|chosafæshæ]] || [[word:chosafækæ|chosafækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chosafathatha|chosafathatha]] || [[word:chosafajaja|chosafajaja]] || [[word:chosafashasha|chosafashasha]] || [[word:chosafakaka|chosafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chosafatha|chosafatha]] || [[word:chosafaja|chosafaja]] || [[word:chosafasha|chosafasha]] || [[word:chosafaka|chosafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chosafafthaf|chosafafthaf]] || [[word:chosafafjaf|chosafafjaf]] || [[word:chosafafshaf|chosafafshaf]] || [[word:chosafafkaf|chosafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chosafasha|chosafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chosafshësha|chosafshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chosafrosha|chosafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chosafmusha|chosafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chosafyasha|chosafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochosafnkshësha|gochosafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochosafnkrosha|gochosafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochosafnkmusha|gochosafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochosafnkyasha|gochosafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chosasafasha|chosasafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chosasafshësha|chosasafshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chosasafrosha|chosasafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chosasafmusha|chosasafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chosasafyasha|chosasafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochosasafnkshësha|gochosasafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochosasafnkrosha|gochosasafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochosasafnkmusha|gochosasafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochosasafnkyasha|gochosasafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chesæfasha|chesæfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chesæfshësha|chesæfshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chesæfrosha|chesæfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chesæfmusha|chesæfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chesæfyasha|chesæfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochesæfnkshësha|gochesæfnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochesæfnkrosha|gochesæfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochesæfnkmusha|gochesæfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochesæfnkyasha|gochesæfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chosfafasha|chosfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chosfafshësha|chosfafshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chosfafrosha|chosfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chosfafmusha|chosfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chosfafyasha|chosfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochosfafnkshësha|gochosfafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochosfafnkrosha|gochosfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochosfafnkmusha|gochosfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochosfafnkyasha|gochosfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
